message:
feat(abi-tests): expand pthread/fenv/setjmp test coverage (+24 tests)

- pthread_cond_core: 13→18 (null cond, past abstime, negative nsec, broadcast wakes 3)
- pthread_mutex_core: 13→18 (trylock cycles, init/destroy cycles, contention 2-thread)
- pthread_thread_lifecycle: 15→20 (double detach, name too long, sequential create, equal)
- fenv_abi: 19→25 (rounding preserves exceptions, null rejection, deterministic env)
- setjmp_abi: 18→21 (null determinism, aligned buffer, sequential all-variants)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
